name: config-hooks
description: Verify config hooks system loads without errors during startup

config.command: bash -c 'mkdir -p .kollab && echo "{\"hooks\":{\"UserPromptSubmit\":[{\"hooks\":[{\"type\":\"command\",\"command\":\"echo ok\"}]}]}}" > .kollab/hooks.json && python main.py; rm -f .kollab/hooks.json'

steps.title: Test 1: App starts normally with hooks.json

steps.description: App started with config hooks loaded

steps.title: Test 2: No crash or error visible

steps.description: No config hook errors in output
